sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31279" key="ei)sane/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰσαν-έχω</orth>, intr., <sense id="n31279.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rise above,</tr_> c. gen., ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0001.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:1360" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1360</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0001.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:291" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.291</biblScope> </bibl> : c. acc., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γαῖαν εἰσανέχει πέλαγος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0001.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:1578" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1578</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
